baseline.summary: copy_state=False aliases mutable runtime state; restore diverges after later in-place mutations.

candidate.summary: checkpoint() snapshots mutable runtime state by default; restore returns the saved state across repeated seeds.

evaluation_command: PYTHONPATH=src uv run --no-sync python - <<'PY' ... compare checkpoint(copy_state=False) vs checkpoint() over seeds 0..7
notes: Mutable-state harness used a custom in-place env and fake jax to isolate runner state handling.
Baseline and candidate comparisons used the same repeated seeds and action sequence; the baseline used the explicit aliasing path to represent the pre-fix semantics.
